pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate javax.inject dependency to jakarta.inject-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject artifacts are removed or deprecated in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code using javax.inject annotations will fail to compile or link against Jakarta-based libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation-api dependency to jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation artifacts are removed or deprecated in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code using javax.annotation annotations will fail to compile or link against Jakarta-based libraries.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.PostConstruct import to jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 10+ annotations; code fails to compile without the new import.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Migrate javax.inject.Inject import to jakarta.inject.Inject for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: javax.inject package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 10+ annotations; code fails to compile without the new import.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the Java EE javax.inject package to the Jakarta EE jakarta.inject package.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 10+ (used by Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.inject does not exist'.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.PostConstruct import to jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 10+ annotations; code fails to compile without the new import.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Migrate javax.inject.Inject import to jakarta.inject.Inject for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: javax.inject package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 10+ annotations; code fails to compile without the new import.

wire-di-annotations/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate dependency from javax.inject to jakarta.inject-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-annotations/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.inject artifact is not available or compatible with the Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3 and JDK 21 environments; using the old groupId/artifactId results in missing class errors at runtime or compile time if the new API is expected.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 21 in the Maven properties.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.why_exists: Without this, the project may compile with an older Java version, failing to utilize Java 21 features or causing incompatibility with dependencies requiring Java 21.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.general_idea: Add dependency on jakarta.inject-api to replace javax.inject.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration require Jakarta namespaces; using javax.inject will cause ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime if the code uses Jakarta annotations.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.general_idea: Add dependency on jakarta.annotation-api to replace javax.annotation.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration require Jakarta namespaces; using javax.annotation will cause ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime if the code uses Jakarta annotations.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate JSR-250 annotations from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and not present in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes, causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the dependency is not explicitly provided.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate JSR-330 annotations from javax.inject to jakarta.inject namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: javax.inject package is removed in Java 11+ and not present in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes, causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the dependency is not explicitly provided.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Nullable with jakarta.annotation.Nullable to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 10+ annotations; using javax causes compile errors or missing class runtime failures.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Generated annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE standards.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: The javax.annotation.Generated class is removed or unavailable in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (like Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error if the old import is used.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Generated annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: The javax.annotation.Generated class is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (like Spring Boot 3), causing a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error if the classpath does not include the legacy javax.annotation-api.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate import from javax.inject.Inject to jakarta.inject.Inject to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.inject does not exist in Jakarta EE 10+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate import from javax.inject.Named to jakarta.inject.Named to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.inject does not exist in Jakarta EE 10+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate javax.inject.Inject import to jakarta.inject.Inject to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax.inject.Inject will fail to compile or link against Spring Boot 3 dependencies which use jakarta.inject.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for PostConstruct from the javax.annotation package to the jakarta.annotation package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using the old import causes a compile error (cannot find symbol) when targeting Java 21 with Spring Boot 3.3.

wire-di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 21 in the Maven properties.
wire-di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project may compile with an older Java version, failing to utilize Java 21 features or causing incompatibility with dependencies requiring Java 21.

wire-di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency on jakarta.inject-api to replace javax.inject for Java 21/Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
wire-di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3); code using @Inject will fail to compile or run without the Jakarta namespace equivalent.

wire-di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency on jakarta.annotation-api to replace javax.annotation for Java 21/Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
wire-di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3); code using @Generated or other annotations will fail to compile or run without the Jakarta namespace equivalent.

wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.general_idea: Migrate JSR-330 dependency injection annotations from javax.inject to jakarta.inject package.
wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.why_exists: javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 10+ and Spring Boot 3.x; code fails to compile if the javax.inject dependency is not present or if the target environment enforces Jakarta namespaces.

wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate the javax.inject.Provider import to jakarta.inject.Provider to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (package not found) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate the javax.inject.Provider import to jakarta.inject.Provider to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (package not found).

wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate import from javax.inject to jakarta.inject to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.
